internal_thoughts:

parsed_output.justification: Mike claims to be the Troublemaker and states he swapped Alana and Matt. Alana confirms she started as the Tanner and is now the Insomniac, which implies Matt started as the Insomniac and is now the Tanner. Caitlynn claims to be the Seer, having looked at the center cards. This leaves Mitchell as the only player who could be the Werewolf, and he further draws suspicion by jokingly suggesting the group vote for him.

This leaves Mitchell as the only player who could be the Werewolf, and he further draws suspicion by jokingly suggesting the group vote for him.
